allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\(''@vkontakte/icons''\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.includes\(''Icon28''\) && k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''list''\)\); console.log\(names.join\(''\\n''\)\)")
